rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDITH RITA FARRELL REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Disqualification Of Commissioner Judge Pro Tem Sue M. Kaplan, From Hearing Any And All Matters Re Sanctions Based On Alleged Prior Motions For Judgment On The Pleadings And Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Among the various motions is a CCP 170.6 challenge to Commissioner Kaplan. Tenative ruling: Grant the CCP 170.6 challenge. Parties are to appear for purposes of rescheduling before a different judicial officer.
